strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era practices, Selenium course author, Fluent-Asserts library)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume

response.justification: Candidate is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with a strong craftsmanship orientation, directly relevant TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB/AWS background, and current hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure including MCP — a close match to the role's stack and AI requirement. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js experience and dated Kotlin/Java exposure, but the breadth of languages and demonstrated ability to pick the right tool suggest these are learnable.
